title: TOUGH MASTER Garden Hose 15m 50ft with 6 Pattern Spray Gun and 3 Nozzles, 3-Layer Reinforced Hosepipe 1/2 inch for Lawn Irrigation, Car Washing, Pet Care, Patio Cleaning, Outdoor Use
features: DURABLE AND RELIABLE 3-LAYER CONSTRUCTION: This reinforced hose pipe features a rugged, 3-layer braided construction that offers amazing durability and reliability, so you can keep the hose for many seasons to come.

EASY TO SET UP AND CLEAN: Simply attach the hosepipe to a matching tap connector and spray away. Unlike other delicate water hoses, this garden hose pipe can be easily scrubbed and cleaned with basic hose cleaning solutions.

WEATHERPROOF: Thanks to its 3-layer construction and tight braid pattern, the watering hose pipe is great for use in all seasons. Feel free to use your hosepipe safely in the hotter (+65°C) and colder months (-5°C).

EASY STORAGE: The flexible design allows these garden hose pipes to be coiled up neatly without kinking, saving storage space. Additionally, they’re compatible with standard hose reels for even easier storage.

HANDY LENGTH: This 15m water hose is a practical length for a smaller garden/outdoor space, as it will be able to get to all the nooks and crannies of the lawn. Treat the wildlife and grow your plants for a natural, vibrant garden.

6 FUNCTION SPRAY NOZZLE: This 50ft garden hose with a 6-function spray nozzle has the opportunity to be used for many purposes. Give your garden a watering, car a wash, your pet a shower, or clean your outdoor windows!
description: TOUGH MASTER Garden Hose 15m 50ft with 6 Pattern Spray Gun and 3 Nozzles, 3-Layer Reinforced Hosepipe 1/2 inch for Lawn Irrigation, Car Washing, Pet Care, Patio Cleaning, Outdoor Use Product Description The TOUGH MASTER® TM-GHS15M PVC Garden Hose is an essential tool for outdoor watering and maintenance, making gardening and yard work more efficient and convenient. The water hose pipe is an excellent starter kit that includes a 15M PVC hose with a 1/2" (12mm) diameter and a four-piece spray gun kit. With a length of 15m, the gardening hose is more than adequate for small to medium-sized gardens. Its 3-ply construction includes a layer of mesh fibre reinforcement to keep the garden hoses in shape, allowing you free-flowing water; the yellow protective outer layer prevents damage and guards against algae, UV radiation and all temperatures between -5°C and +65°C. To help you out in watering the plants adequately, get these hose pipes with spray gun. The spray gun has 6 different watering patterns: Mist, Full, Center, Shower, Flat, and Cone, which can be adjusted as per the requirement by turning the nozzle head. This multipurpose spray gun is not only useful for watering the plants, but it can also be used for washing your vehicles. Storing these TOUGH MASTER® garden hose pipes is a breeze. Their flexible design allows them to be coiled up neatly without kinking, saving you valuable storage space. Additionally, they’re compatible with standard hose reels for even easier storage. Excellent for watering your garden, lawn, washing your car, pets and outdoor areas around your house. Contents Of This Product ‎1 x Hose pipe 6-pattern spray gun 1/2''&3/4'' threaded tap connector 1/2'' female water stop 1/2'' female fitting Product Specifications Part No: TM-GHS15M Barcode: 5060807721473 Hose length: 15M Hose inner diameter: 11.8mm Add Working pressure: 7 bar Add Burst pressure: 21 bar Add Accessories included: 6-pattern spray gun 1/2''&3/4'' threaded tap connector 1/2'' female water stop 1/2'' female fitting Application: Compatible with all standard 1/2″ equipment and fittings
